title: AIR for JAVA
description:
This is AIR for JAVA modpack.
A full-dimensional optimized modpack mixed with most mainstream Forge and Fabric mods.
body:
![AIR for JAVA](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e595f204a1803e1341d05dc31fd0dc7901bea266.png)

This is the official release page of AIR for JAVA modpack, formerly known as modpack for Minecraft AIR JAVA Server, which started in 2020.

After the baptism of many modLoader such as forge and fabric, in January 2024, AIR for JAVA modpack was officially determined as a dual-end universal integration modpack of forge and fabric based on Sinytra Connector. This means that it can use mods based on forge loader or mods based on fabric in this and future updates.


## **Introduction to gameplay**

As we all know, some large mods, such as better nether and better end, which are optimized for the nether world and the end world, have not released their forge versions until today. Some of the latest mainstream Forge and Fabric mods can't coexist in the game, which makes many players have a headache. For example, although some integration modpacks have optimized the play experience of the main world as much as possible, their nether world and the end world are poor, which is the reason for the creation of AIR for JAVA modpack.

- Excellent biota and terrain reconstruction mods such as "Biomes O' Plenty", "Better nether", "Better end", "Alex's Cave", "Deeper and Darker", "Let's Let's do beach party”,“Terralith" and "Tan's Huge Trees";
![Towering peaks at dusk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a151884665ef9314ea593d706ad8016dec03af91.png)
![Nether world](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/000f261b4e11736a634ebe7f305865ad5053eace.png)
- Mainstream survival factors such as "Create", "Farmer's Delight", "Butcher‘s Delight", "Caupona" and "Epic Fight" add classes and cooking mods;
![Cooking in the beautiful scenery](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb01bd0172544c406b0ea00408c34bd57df27cd5.png)
- Mods such as "Alex's mob" make your world an animal paradise; You can also walk through a dense forest in the afternoon and come to a quiet white cliff, looking at sakura valley and lavender plain in the distance, and set up a pot to start cooking ... But at this time, you find that you need to catch some jellyfish or crabs as food, so you put on your sheath wings and jump down from the cliff to the valley beside the sakura tree ... With the support of fishing mods such as "Aquatic Products 2", you can fish different fishes in different kinds of rivers. At the same time, because this modpack combines the fishing optimization mod such as "Fishingreal", most of the fishes you catch will appear in the form of entities rather than items!
![Cheese snow leopard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e15d6c2938d4876f4822569fd731873f4abd208.png)
- In addition, in terms of adventure, you can now set up your own legion by using "Villager Recruits", and hire as many as dozens of village mercenaries to take risks all over the world. You can also let your friends join your legion. Every time you defeat a certain number of monsters, you will attract the attention of the undead armies hidden in the darkness. The sky begins to thunderstorm, and they appear from the shadows and attack you! ; This mcpack also adds a more difficult terminal mechanism. Now, you must collect 12 Endeyes with different shapes from all over the world, take them to the huge terminal fortress deep underground, cross the labyrinth corridor and find the terminal portal at the end of the maze. Finally, you may need to go to a mysterious terminal church alone. .....
![Mercenary](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98b3a2464058ead1af3a5c886b3dbb41df04b008.png)
AIR for JAVA mcpack has expanded almost all the original content without dead ends. Adventurers, cooking enthusiasts, travelers and photographers, parkour lovers and Redstone players can all find their own homes in this modpack!

## **Future updates in the plan**

1.Better leaves and dynamic tree mod are applied to all biota of the integrated package,so as to improve the uniformity of the overall effect.

2.Apply "Distant Horizons" to this Mcpacks after it is compatible with "Oculus".

3.After the release of "create: aeronautics", it is applied to this mcpack so that players can establish mobile bases more freely.

4.Further enhance the compatibility between different mods, and make the resourcepack effect (such as the "Stay true" material recommended by mcpacks) be applied to all groups by constructing new datapacks.

5.Further update the branch class mod of various mainstream mods.

## **Some use needs to be known**

1. Because this modpack uses "connector" as the core mod, it only supports LAN online for multiplayer games at present, and may not support most mainstream servers at present.

2. This modpack does not support all shaderpacks that do not support iris or oculus.
   
3. This modpack does not support all mods that do not support rubidium.

4. If all the contents need to be displayed in English in the game, please delete these mods: I18nUpdateMod and show key.

5. It is suggested to choose Ampl.&Better X type when creating the world. 

6. Physical mod has been provided since version alpha1.09 of Air for Java modpack,which requires high equipment performance. If the game is severely stuck, you can choose to delete "physics-mod" yourself.

## **Recommended resoucepacks,shaderpacks and jdk version**

1.Resourcepacks:

- Stay true
- Flintl0cks_v2.0

2.Shaderpacks：

- SEUS Renewed v1.0.1(Since modrinth does not provide the download of this shaderpack, please download it yourself in other channels.)

3.Jdk version

- Jdk 21.0.2

## **Official communication channel**

Discord and more communication platforms will be opened in the future, so stay tuned.
